items.prompt: This course primarily teaches Verilator as…
choices: A daily tool flow: lint, C++/DPI TB, trace, metrics
Git branching and code review only
items.explain: The arc is tool literacy, not UVM depth.

choices: Local Verilator, C++, and Makefile examples
Only paper worksheets with no simulator
Only browser games unrelated to HDL
items.explain: Track A is the real toolchain.

items.prompt: Track B browser labs are best for…
choices: Conceptual literacy before or alongside real runs
items.explain: Labs teach ideas; Track A proves fidelity.

items.prompt: Deep UVM and VIP construction belong in sibling courses, not this Verilator tool path.
items.explain: This path stays focused on Verilator as a simulator tool.
